name: Swiss-Sauced Broccoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash broccoli and remove outer leaves and tough part of stalks.
2. Cut broccoli stalks lengthwise into uniform spears, following the branching lines.
3. In a 1-quart casserole, combine broccoli, water, and 1/8 teaspoon salt. Cook on high power for 5 to 6 minutes or until tender. Let stand while preparing sauce.
4. For the sauce, melt butter in a 1-cup measure. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper.
5. Add milk and cook until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds. Cook on high power for 1 to 2 minutes.
6. Stir in shredded Swiss cheese until melted.
7. Drain broccoli and serve sauce atop.
